evals.prompt: Add a primary Save button and a secondary Cancel button to the form footer.
evals.expected_output: IGRPButton with variant default for Save, variant outline or secondary for Cancel.

evals.prompt: Create a delete button that shows a loading spinner when clicked.
evals.expected_output: IGRPButton variant destructive with loading prop, loadingText for accessibility.

evals.prompt: Add an icon-only add button in the header.
evals.expected_output: IGRPButton size icon or icon-sm with iconName (e.g. Plus), aria-label for accessibility.
